items.title: COVER Corporation Announces hololive Meet 2026 Ambassadors as it celebrates 5th Year of Activities
items.author: Horii
items.content:
COVER Corporation has announced new initiatives to commemorate the 5th year of activities for hololive Meet, including several exciting announcements to celebrate this milestone year. These include the introduction of a special anniversary logo, the appointment of new hololive Meet 2026 Ambassadors, and additional activities designed to make this year’s hololive Meet even more memorable.

hololive Meet 5th Anniversary Commemorative Logo

To celebrate the 5th year of activities, hololive Meet, a special commemorative logo has been unveiled. This logo will be featured across various hololive Meet activities throughout the year alongside the original logo as hololive Meet ramps up to its 5th anniversary.

hololive Meet 2026 Ambassadors

The new Ambassadors for hololive Meet 2026 have been announced.

Tsunomaki Watame (hololive), Airani Iofifteen (hololive Indonesia), Gigi Murin (hololive English), and Rindo Chihaya (hololive DEV_IS) have been appointed as hololive Meet 2026 Ambassadors, where they will be actively promoting ongoing and upcoming hololive Meet projects. Look forward to their activities over the following year as they meet with fans all over the world!

Comments from hololive Meet 2026 Ambassadors

Tsunomaki Watame (hololive) Hoof, hoof, helloof!

I’m Tsunomaki Watame from hololive Generation 4!

Your worldwide Watame has… finally… been selected as an ambassador for hololive Meet 2026! I’m super happy!

It’s all thanks to everyone who’s always cheering me on. Thank you!

I’ll do my best to bring lots of happiness to Watamates and hololive fans around the world! Let’s have fun!

Airani Iofifteen (hololive Indonesia) IOFORIA! OBISA! It’s your cute Alien from hololive Indonesia 1st Generation! So happy to be selected to be the hololive Meet Ambassador in 2026 for their 5th year!

With this 5th year together I’ll be sure to paint the whole world!

Be prepared to be painted in colors and happiness!

Gigi Murin (hololive English) GIIIIIII~MURIN EVERYWAN!!!!!!! It’s me, GIGI MURIN, from hololive English Justice (˶ᵔ ᵕ ᵔ˶)

Woah… Gigi Murin as an ambassador for holoMeet 2026?? Isn’t that kinda crazy??

Who’s letting Gigi Murin on stage with the mic!! Oh no!! Get her down from there!! Σ(°ロ°)Σ(°ロ°)Σ(°ロ°)

JUST KIDDING (,; ⩌ ;,) Gigi Murin can be trusted on speaker in front of your family ( ⸝⸝´꒳`⸝⸝)

Can’t wait to make even more fun memories with everyone this year!!

Rindo Chihaya (hololive DEV_IS) Pedal to the metal! Let’s go! I’m Rindo Chihaya, the DJ and Driver of hololive DEV_IS FLOW GLOW!

And I’ve been chosen as an ambassador for hololive Meet 2026! I’m so happy!

Because of all your support, I can cross the ocean and go meet everyone!

I want to connect with fans around the world even more and make tons of unforgettable memories together, so I’ll do my very best!

Special Merchandise from hololive Meet 2026 Ambassadors

To celebrate the launch of the new ambassadors, Tokyo Otaku Mode has released a lineup of new merchandise featuring the 2026 Ambassadors. Check out the link below to pre-order today!

hololive Meet STARS Navigator

As part of this year’s hololive Meet initiatives, a new project titled “hololive Meet STARS Navigator” has been announced. This project will allow fans to enjoy hololive Meet from a new angle. Stay tuned to the official hololive Meet homepage and social media for more in the near future!

items.title: Kazama Iroha x Yamana Wines & Spirits Collaborate for “MIKADOMATSU Kodawari Yuzu Sake, Kazama Iroha Ver.”, Available from April 23!
items.author: narita
items.content:
April 24, 2026, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Motoaki Tanigo) is pleased to announce the the release of the collaboration product “MIKADOMATSU Kodawari Yuzu Sake Kazama Iroha Ver.”, created in partnership with Kazama Iroha of Secret Society holoX, and the sake brand “YAMANA” under YAMANA WINES & SPIRITS Co., Ltd. This product is available for order from April 23, 2026, at 20:30 (JST).

This is a special edition release based on the liqueur “MIKADOMATSU Kodawari Yuzu Sake”, produced by Matsuoka Brewing Co., Ltd., a sake brewery located in Ogawa Town, Saitama Prefecture, that incorporates the world and aesthetic of Kazama Iroha.

This product is a yuzu liqueur made using carefully cultivated yuzu from Moro Yuzu Orchard in Saitama Prefecture. It features a refreshing taste with a fragrant and fresh yuzu aroma, balanced with a gentle sweetness.

With its clean and light finish, it is designed to be enjoyable even for those who are new to alcoholic beverages. It can be enjoyed chilled as is, on the rocks, or mixed with soda, offering a variety of ways to enjoy it.

About the Manufacturer (Matsuoka Brewing Co., Ltd.)

Matsuoka Brewing Co., Ltd., the manufacturer of this product, is a historic sake brewery founded in 1851 in Ogawa Town, Saitama Prefecture.

Using natural water from the Chichibu mountain range, the brewery produces sake with a rich mineral content and a smooth mouthfeel.

By combining long-established techniques with tradition, the brewery continues to produce high-quality sake and liqueurs.

■ Collaboration Highlights This product is based on the existing “MIKADOMATSU Kodawari Yuzu Sake” and is developed as a limited-edition version that reflects the charm of Kazama Iroha.

The packaging features newly illustrated artwork created specifically for this project. The design, illustrated by Yukiharu, blends the refreshing nature of yuzu with a traditional Japanese aesthetic.

Both the bottle label and the gift box are exclusive designs created for this collaboration.

Product Name: MIKADOMATSU Kodawari Yuzu Sake Kazama Iroha Ver. Alcohol Content: 11%

Sales Start: April 23, 2026, from 20:30 (JST)

Sales Channel: YAMANA Official Online Store

https://sakeyamana.jp International shipping is available for foreign customers.

About Yamana Wines & Spirits

Yamana Wines & Spirits draws its inspiration from the spirit of the Yamana people, who lived in harmony with nature at the southernmost edge of the world. Guided by their resilience and appreciation for the natural world, we seek out exceptional wines and spirits from across the globe.

As a boutique house specializing in Japanese sake, wine, and spirits, we are committed to curating selections that reflect the craftsmanship of their makers and the unique character of their origins. Each bottle we present is not merely a product, but a story—an expression of heritage, technique, and place.

items.title: Ninomae Ina’nis x SAKEBOYS “Inatsu” Season 2 is Now Available!
items.author: os_pr
items.content:
April 23, 2026, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) is pleased to announce the release of “Inatsu -伊夏-” Season 2, a special collaboration project between hololive English -Myth- member Ninomae Ina’nis and SAKEBOYS. This project continues the journey of exploring the world of Japanese sake together with fans, sharing new discoveries, experiences, and appreciation for traditional craftsmanship.

The key focus of Season 2 is yeast — an essential element that shapes the aroma and character of sake. Inspired by the idea that yeast can create fruit-like fragrances in sake, Ninomae Ina’nis participated in tasting multiple trial brews and selected a yeast profile that highlights a gentle and elegant pear-like aroma.

The sake is carefully brewed by Seto Shuzo in Saga Prefecture, using traditional methods and locally-developed yeast.

Product Name: Inatsu -伊夏- Season 2 Brewery: Seto Shuzo (Saga, Japan)

ALCOHOL %: 16%

Rice Polishing Ratio: 48%

Volume: 720ml

Japan Retail Price: ¥9,680 (tax included)

Customers in Japan can log in and purchase directly via the official website. Overseas sales are currently under preparation.* Details will be announced at a later date.

Please follow SAKEBOYS’s official social media channels for additional updates: Official SAKEBOYS X account: https://x.com/sakeboysjp

Seto Shuzo, located in Ureshino City, Saga Prefecture, is a sake brewery dedicated to crafting “honest sake” through traditional techniques and careful ingredient selection. Utilizing locally developed yeast from Saga Prefecture, the brewery focuses on expressing delicate and fruit-forward aromas, bringing out the full potential of each brew.

For “Inatsu -伊夏-” Season 2, this philosophy aligns with the project’s focus on yeast, highlighting how subtle differences in fermentation can shape the overall character and experience of the sake.

SAKEBOYS is a brand dedicated to sharing the diverse flavors and culture of Kyushu sake with the world.

items.title: COVER Corporation Announces hololive English 4th Concert -Serendipity-!
items.author: narita
items.content:
April 20, 2026, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) has announced that hololive English will be holding their fourth concert event, hololive English 4th Concert -Serendipity-, on the 3rd and 4th of July at the Shrine Auditorium in Los Angeles, USA.

At this concert fans will be able to experience performances by seven special units, each based on a unique theme. Fans will have the chance to participate in the creation of unit names through a special project, with additional details to be announced at a later date.

For information regarding ticket sales, merchandise details, and the latest updates, please check the official website and official X account below:

hololive English 4th Concert -Serendipity- Overview

hololive English 4th Concert -Serendipity- Organized by: COVER Corporation

#holoSerendipity #hololiveEN

・ Day 1

Friday, July 3rd, 2026 (PDT)

Doors open at 6:30 PM / Streaming starts at 7:30 PM / Event starts at 8:00 PM

・ Day 2 Saturday, July 4th, 2026 (PDT)

Doors open at 6:30 PM / Streaming starts at 7:30 PM / Event starts at 8:00 PM

Shrine Auditorium Los Angeles, CA 90007

Mori Calliope / Takanashi Kiara / Ninomae Ina’nis / IRyS / Ouro Kronii / Hakos Baelz / Shiori Novella / Koseki Bijou / Nerissa Ravencroft / Fuwawa Abyssgard / Mococo Abyssgard / Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame / Gigi Murin / Cecilia Immergreen / Raora Panthera

Venue Tickets (Shrine Auditorium)

・ Front ORCHESTRA & LOGE: 225 USD ・ Middle ORCHESTRA / Front BALCONY: 175 USD

・ Side ORCHESTRA & BALCONY: 150 USD

・ Rear ORCHESTRA / Middle BALCONY: 135 USD

・ Rear BALCONY 1: 110 USD

・ Rear BALCONY 2: 95 USD

■ Ticket Sales Period (PDT) Pre-sale by AXS*: 9 AM, April 20th, 2026 〜 Start of the event

General Sales: 9 AM, April 22nd, 2026 〜 Start of the event

* Venue ticket presale benefits are available under certain conditions specified by the ticketing platform, AXS, and the venue, Shrine Auditorium.

Please refer to Shrine Auditorium’s official X account for details on how to receive a pre-sale code:https://x.com/@ShrineLA

・ 1-DAY Streaming Ticket (July 3rd PDT) ・ 1-DAY Streaming Ticket (July 4th PDT)

On sale from April 6, 2026, 13:00 (JST)

items.title: Announcing the hololive English -Justice- x OMOCAT Collection!
items.author: os_pr
items.content:
April 10, 2026, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Motoaki Tanigo) is pleased to announce the latest collaboration between OMOCAT and hololive English, featuring the members of hololive English -Justice-. Products from the hololive English -Justice- x OMOCAT collection are available from April 10, 2026 (PT).

A highlight from this collection is the collaborative illustration by OMOCAT and Raora Panthera which appears on her hoodie design, and is one of the first OMOCAT products directly created in collaboration with a talent. Bringing together the iconic sensibilities of the artist and the bright and bold personalities of the four members of hololive English’s newest branch, this collaboration will feature apparel products, keychains, acrylic stands, skate decks, and other products for fans to look forward to.

For more information, please visit OMOCAT’s official social media accounts.

For previews of other items in the collection, please stay tuned to OMOCAT’s official social media platforms.

This product will be available for shipping worldwide, excluding mainland China. Products will be available for purchase on OMOCAT’s official website on April 10, 2026 (PT), with future availability at North American conventions. For further updates, please refer to OMOCAT’s official social media platforms.

OMOCAT is an artist brand studio started in 2014 based in LA. In addition to making high quality merchandise, they’re known for the development of their original game, OMORI. OMORI has also been comicalized and is widely sold across the globe. As a team of avid collectors and fanatics with a wide range of interests in art, fashion, music, games, and other realms of creative entertainment, OMOCAT develops high-quality/fashionable merchandise, creating a large fanbase in major conventions across North America. They are one of hololive production’s longest partners, having done collaborations with hololive GAMERS, Hoshimachi Suisei, hololive English -Myth-, and other hololive talents.
